content.title: <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">Legoras Ark — Serveur PvE x3</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.Orange>Bienvenue sur Legoras Ark !</>

Tu viens de rejoindre un serveur <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">PvE x3</> francophone, pense pour une experience confortable et communautaire.

<TextStyle.LightBlue>Raccourcis utiles :</>

• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">F1</> — Ce menu d'information
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">F6</> — Boutique du serveur
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">/shop</> — Commande boutique
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">/recu</> — Recuperer ses objets apres la mort
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">/lsm</> — Lister ses morts

<TextStyle.Green>Bon jeu et bonne aventure !</>

content.title: <RichColor Color="0,1,0.5,1">Taux Generaux</>
content.text:
• Experience : <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">x3</>
• Recolte : <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">x3</>
• Apprivoisement : <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">x10</>
• Qualite des loots : <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">x3</>
• Taille des stacks : <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">x3</>

content.title: <RichColor Color="0.3,0.7,1,1">Taux d'Elevage</>
content.text:
• Incubation : <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">x150</>
• Maturation : <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">x50</>
• Accouplement : <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">x0.05</>
• Calins : <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">x0.015</>
• Imprint universel : <RichColor Color="0,1,0.5,1">✔ Active</>

content.title: <RichColor Color="1,0.5,0,1">Difficulte & Survie</>
content.text:
• Difficulte : <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">5.0</>
• Drain Nourriture : <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">x0.4</>
• Drain Eau : <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">x0.4</>
• Gamma : <RichColor Color="0,1,0.5,1">✔ Active</>
• Vol avec creature : <RichColor Color="0,1,0.5,1">✔ Autorise</>

content.title: <RichColor Color="1,0.3,0.3,1">PvE & Securite</>
content.text:
• Mode : <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">PvE</>
• Friendly Fire : <RichColor Color="0,1,0.5,1">✔ Desactive</>
• Protection hors-ligne : <RichColor Color="0,1,0.5,1">✔ Active</>
• Decay structures/dinos : <RichColor Color="0,1,0.5,1">✔ Desactive</>
• Admin disponible : <RichColor Color="0,1,0.5,1">✔ Oui</>

<TextStyle.LightBlue>Anti PvE Griefing :</>
• Inventaires corps/sacs proteges
• Controle des structures (generateur...)
• Accouplement inter-tribu bloque
• Impossible de porter un joueur/dino
• Oeufs et objets au sol proteges
• Dinos decays detruits auto
• Protection offline personnalisee

content.text:
<TextStyle.LightBlue>Degats x  /  Resistance x</>

content.title: <RichColor Color="1,0.3,0.3,1">Regles 1-4</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.Red>A respecter obligatoirement :</>

<RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">1.</> Respect entre joueurs — obligatoire.
<RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">2.</> Interdiction de bloquer les ressources.
<RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">3.</> Construction hors zones = <RichColor Color="1,0.3,0.3,1">ban permanent.</>
<RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">4.</> Pieger/bloquer un joueur = <RichColor Color="1,0.3,0.3,1">ban permanent.</>

content.title: <RichColor Color="1,0.3,0.3,1">Regles 5-7 & Consequences</>
content.text:
<RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">5.</> Pas d'apprivoisement dans les grottes.
<RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">6.</> Interdiction d'utiliser des bugs/exploits.
<RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">7.</> Pas de spam de structures.

<TextStyle.Red>Consequences :</>
• Infraction legere : <RichColor Color="1,0.65,0,1">Avertissement</>
• Infraction grave : <RichColor Color="1,0.3,0.3,1">Ban immediat</>

content.title: <RichColor Color="0,1,0.8,1">Commandes du Serveur</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.LightBlue>Apres la mort :</>
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">/recu</> — Recupere tes objets perdus
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">/lsm</> — Liste toutes tes morts

<TextStyle.LightBlue>Farmeo automatique :</>
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">/farm</> — Active le farmeo auto
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">/stop</> — Arrete le farmeo

<TextStyle.Red>Attention :</> Objets au sol detruits apres <RichColor Color="1,0.3,0.3,1">2 heures</>

content.title: <RichColor Color="0,1,0.8,1">Objets Reutilisables</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.LightBlue>Ces items se regenerent automatiquement :</>

<TextStyle.Yellow>Armes :</>
• Pistolet a fusee
• Grappin (Grappling Hook)
• Grenade gazeuse
• Bola
• Pistolet de base

<TextStyle.Yellow>Outils :</>
• Fouet

<TextStyle.Yellow>Consommables :</>
• Parachute

content.title: <RichColor Color="0.7,0.3,1,1">Mods Gameplay & Interface</>
content.text:
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">WBUI2</> — Interface personnalisee
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">MX-E Ark Shop UI</> — Boutique en jeu
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">Fusionshop</> — Boutique de fusion
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">AwesomeSpyGlass!</> — Longue-vue amelioree
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">ASA Api Utils</> — Utilitaires API
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">TG Stacking Mod 1000-50</> — Stacking ameliore

content.title: <RichColor Color="0.7,0.3,1,1">Mods Dinos & Qualite de Vie</>
content.text:
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">S-Dino Variants</> — Variantes speciales de dinos
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">Cliffans Horses</> — Chevaux
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">Eggcellent Adventure</> — Evenement oeufs
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">Cryopods</> — Gestion des cryopods
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">HideCryopods</> — Masquer les cryopods
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">Visual Storage</> — Stockage visuel
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">Klinger Rustic Building</> — Construction rustique
• <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">MarniiMods Hairstyles</> — Coiffures & cosmetiques

content.title: <RichColor Color="1,0.84,0,1">Boutique — Points & Commandes</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.Yellow>Gains :</>
• Toutes les 30 min de jeu : <RichColor Color="0,1,0.5,1">+35 pts</>

<TextStyle.Yellow>Commandes :</>
• <RichColor Color="0.3,0.7,1,1">/shop</> — Ouvre la boutique (F6)
